content.en:
"Did Your Excellency get the Five Elements Boundary Crystal?"

This half-step Eternal Controller stopped Ye Tian and asked.

"What does it have to do with you?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

He knew that this person was afraid that he wanted to seize his Five Elements Boundary Crystal, otherwise he would not have stopped him.

Originally, when he first came here, he didn't want to offend people, but if this person was entangled, he didn't mind destroying the other party's clone.

"Of course it has something to do with me, hand over the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, otherwise your clone will stay here, compared to the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, your clone and the treasures on the clone are of higher value. The other party threatened.

"Are you looking for death?"

Ye Tian's breath permeated.

At this moment, his realm was revealed.

In an instant, the other party's expression changed drastically.

"Impossible!"

At first, he thought that Ye Tian was an ordinary half-step eternal controller, after all, Ye Tian was too unfamiliar and must not be famous.

But now, Ye Tian's aura is too terrifying, he is definitely a half-step eternal controller who controls the Eight Nine Hundred and Nineteen Supreme Legendary Body, he only controls the Fifty Percent Supreme Legendary Body, but he is not Ye Tian's opponent.

He wants to escape!

Wow!

Time and space are distorted, and he keeps accelerating his speed, trying to penetrate the layers of time and space to leave.

Suddenly.

Big hands appeared in the surrounding time and space, grabbing him in an instant.

Then, his body began to annihilate, and there was no trace of resistance to it.

Meanwhile.

Somewhere in the 11th Boundary River.

A young man opened his eyes, his pupils constricted, and the fear did not dissipate.

"It's terrifying, the strength of the other party is far beyond my imagination, but I am a half-step eternal controller who controls fifty percent of the supreme legendary body, or I was directly killed in seconds, and I have no ability to resist at all, it is like facing an eternal master. "

He didn't want to encounter such an enemy, so he didn't dare to take revenge.

......

"Nothing good!"

Ye Tian checked the things left behind by this half-step Eternal Master, except for a high-level Eternal Treasure for defense and a high-level Eternal Treasure for combat, it was gone.

This is also normal, some half-step eternal masters are afraid that their treasures will fall into the hands of others, plus their own strength is strong enough, and they don't need to prepare life-saving things, so the clones are very poor.

Next, Ye Tian continued to look for the Five Elements Boundary Crystal.

He had the duplicate body of the Five Elements Realm Beast, so the difficulty of finding the Five Elements Boundary Crystal was very low, far surpassing that of the other Eternal Masters.

As time passed, pieces of the Five Five Realm Crystals fell into his hands, and he was also attacked by many half-step Eternal Masters, but anyone who attacked him was seconded by him

After a long time, many half-step Eternal Controllers knew that there was an almost invincible half-step Eternal Controller from the Five Elements Domain Sea, so they were extremely jealous, at least they didn't dare to fight indiscriminately.

this day.

Ye Tian manipulated the Five Elements Realm Beast to copy its body and wander to a certain area, sensing a strong fluctuation of the Five Elements energy.

I'm afraid there are five elements boundary crystals here, and there is more than one.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian approached here and quickly sensed the Five Elements Realm Beasts.

"The Great Lair of the Five Elements Realm Beast!"

Ye Tian sensed no less than a hundred Five Elements Realm Beasts, many of which were half-step Eternal Masters whose strength was comparable to that of controlling seven or eighty percent of the supreme legendary bodies.

It can be said that this is a forbidden area for the half-step eternal master, and no one dares to come here.

Even if there are a lot of Five Elements Boundary Crystals here, they can't kill them, unless it's cooperation.

But even if it is cooperation, if everyone is not aligned, it is easy to fall, and the fall of the clone is a great loss for them, so I am afraid that no one dares to attack here.

Although Ye Tian was not afraid of these Five Elements Realm Beasts, once he entered it head-on, it would be easy to be dragged back, and if other half-step Eternal Masters took the opportunity to take advantage of it, he would have to die of depression.

"Let the Five Elements Realm Beast copy its body and blend in, take refuge in them, and then take the opportunity to sneak in and steal the Five Elements Boundary Crystal, even if it is discovered, it can be killed, and other half-step Eternal Masters will not be able to take advantage of the opportunity to pick up the bargain. Ye Tian thought so.

So, he did.

I have to say that the wisdom of these Five Elements Realm Beasts is still average.

Ye Tian took refuge, and they really accepted it.

In this way, a copy of Ye Tian's body was mixed here.

At first, Ye Tian didn't do it, he was going to wait for a while before doing it.

In the blink of an eye, some years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was hidden in the body of the Five Elements Realm Beast, and he hid it with all his might, and it would be difficult to find it if he didn't explore it carefully.

And at this moment, he had already determined the location of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal.

Moreover, there are at least more than 100 Five Elements Boundary Crystals here, once you capture these more than 100 Five Elements Boundary Crystals, you will make a lot of money!

Soon, Ye Tian approached the position of the Five Elements Boundary Crystal.

"Do it!"

Ye Tian burst out with all his strength, without hiding at all, and directly shattered layers of time and space, touching those Five Elements Boundary Crystals.

"Collect and !!"

Ye Tian continued to collect these Five Elements Boundary Crystals, and the Five Elements Boundary Beasts copied their bodies to block the other Five Elements Boundary Beasts.

However, the Five Elements Realm Beast could not replicate its body combat power, so it was quickly killed.

But this is enough time for Ye Tian!

"The Five Elements Boundary Crystal has been successfully collected!"

Ye Tian took the Five Elements Boundary Crystal and fought with these Five Elements Realm Beasts.

His real 210 power was too strong, and the ordinary Five Elements Realm Beast was annihilated by him in an instant.

Soon, he rushed out.

And the battle here attracted the attention of many half-step Eternal Masters, and these half-step Eternal Masters came quickly, and when they saw this amazing scene, they were all stunned.

"Who is this, who actually fought with more than a hundred Five Elements Realm beasts with his own strength?"

"Here I know that once a half-step Eternal Controller who controlled ninety percent of the Supreme Legendary Body all returned with a feather and almost fell, but I didn't expect that there would be a half-step Eternal Controller who came here to seize the Five Elements Boundary Crystal. "

"You, this half-step Eternal Master, seems to have succeeded!"

"How did he do it?"

"Strength, haven't you seen it, the other party's strength is much stronger than the half-step Eternal Realm that has controlled ninety percent of the supreme legendary body, maybe it has already controlled ten percent. "

"No, he didn't control ten percent of the supreme legendary body, but his own physical body was too terrifying, and his strength was so terrifying!"

These half-step Eternal Masters were watching the excitement, but no one dared to participate.

Soon.

Ye Tian completely broke away from the encirclement and killed more than twenty Five Elements Realm Beasts.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian immediately left the Five Elements Domain Sea, and no one dared to deal with him along the way.

Just as he had just left the Five Elements Domain Sea, one Eternal Controller appeared. _
